home.title:
Turn receipts
into social
records.
home.noHistoryHint: Your scan history will appear here

photoTips.title: Photo Tips
photoTips.forBestResults: For best results, make sure your photo:

errors.BLURRY: The photo came out a bit blurry. Try holding your phone steadier and shoot again.
errors.CROPPED: Part of the receipt looks cut off. Make sure all edges are in frame.
errors.LOW_LIGHT: It's too dark. Try turning on a light or using flash.
errors.OCCLUDED: Something is covering the text — maybe a finger? Try again with the receipt fully exposed.
errors.NOT_A_RECEIPT: We couldn't identify a receipt here. Make sure you're photographing a clear bill.
errors.NO_ITEMS_FOUND: We couldn't find any items. Try a better-lit photo.
errors.TOO_MANY_REQUESTS: Rate limit reached. Please wait a moment before scanning again.
errors.RATE_LIMITED: Please wait a moment before scanning again.
errors.DAILY_QUOTA_EXCEEDED: Daily scan limit reached. Please try again tomorrow or add billing to your Gemini API project.
errors.ANTHROPIC_AUTH_ERROR: OCR authentication failed. Please check the API key configuration.
errors.MODEL_ABORTED: The scan was blocked by a content filter. Try a different photo or retake from a cleaner angle.
errors.GENERIC: Something went wrong. Please try again.

tips.frame: Full receipt in frame, top to bottom
tips.readable: Prices and item names must be readable

review.title: Review Items
review.lowConfidence: Some items may need checking — please review carefully
review.lowConfidenceDetail: Low scan confidence — the receipt may be blurry or partially cut off. Please check every item name and price carefully before continuing.
review.subtotalMismatch: Items total doesn't match receipt subtotal
review.magicFixFailed: Gemini couldn't resolve the difference — please check items manually.
review.noItems: No items yet. Tap "Add Item" above.
review.flaggedItem: ⚠️ Unit price was recalculated from the charged total. Please verify.

people.title: Who's splitting?
people.chooseHowSettle: Choose how you want to settle this ledger. Start splitting with people.
people.justMeDesc: Solo claim of the entire bill
people.addPeopleWith: Add the people splitting with you.

tip.title: Tip & Tax
tip.subtitle: How much would you like to tip?

auth.emailError: Invalid credentials. Check your email and password.
auth.googleError: Google sign-in failed. Please try again.

settings.title: Settings
settings.deleteConfirm: Are you sure? This permanently deletes all your data.
settings.doNotSell: We do not sell your personal information

consent.message: We use Firebase to store your scan history and account. This is required for the app to work.

onboarding.step1Message: Tap here to photograph your receipt — AI reads it in seconds
onboarding.step2Message: Check the items — tap any row to fix a name or price
onboarding.step3Message: Each person taps what they ate
onboarding.step4Message: Everyone sees exactly what they owe

errorBoundary.title: Something went wrong
errorBoundary.message: An unexpected error occurred. Your data is safe — please reload the app.
